summary: Hard reload of https://v0.app/ did NOT trigger any v2.2.3 full-page warning intercept (tab title remained 'v0 by Vercel - Build Agents, Apps, and Websites with AI', NOT '보안 정책 - 접근 차단'). Page loaded normally with landing 'What do you want to create?' prompt + 'Sign In'/'Sign Up' buttons prominent — user is NOT authenticated. Typed RRN prompt into the 'Ask v0 to build…' input and clicked submit (up-arrow) button twice; text remained in the input field with NO chat thread, NO message bubble, NO assistant response, and NO warning text containing '차단' rendered. Page state unchanged after submit — v0 likely intercepts unauth submissions client-side (redirect to Sign In modal not triggered, but POST never fired). Cannot disambiguate between (a) APF S2 warning lost in regression vs (b) v0 client never POSTed due to missing auth. Recommend re-running with logged-in v0 session to clear AUTH confound.

comparison_to_v2_2_3_baseline: AUTH confound — cannot fully classify as REGRESSION_S2_lost because S2 (form-submit) path was blocked by missing auth, not by APF. Navigation-time S1 intercept absent (page loaded normally), which matches #831 qianwen pattern under v2.2.3 for unauth sessions.
